docs.title: Approved Editorial Source Registry
docs.summary: Canonical reference for Saiko's curated list of approved editorial sources. Bobby maintains this list. A source enters only if it clearly improves cultural interpretation or factual coverage. This document mirrors the code-level registry in lib/source-registry.ts.

docs.title: Coverage Ops Dashboard v1
docs.summary: 4-tab coverage operations dashboard spec — Overview, Tier Health, Enrichment Tools, Neighborhoods. Replaces prior 6-tab layout.

docs.title: Coverage Tiers — Entity Enrichment Model
docs.summary: Defines the coverage tier model for entity enrichment. Six tiers from raw identity through experiential interpretation, with enrichment strategy (merchant surfaces first, editorial sources second, human third), entity-type signal requirements, and scanner integration points.

docs.title: Data Completeness Philosophy
docs.summary: Saiko's philosophy on data completeness — composite confidence over checklists, multiple paths to the same truth, and no single golden field.

docs.title: Enrichment Evidence Model v1 — Presence, Absence, and Interpretation
docs.summary: Establishes the principle that enrichment is the foundation of all downstream interpretation. Defines confirmed absence as a first-class signal, source-aware staleness cadence, and the rule that entity classification (dimensions) is derived from enrichment evidence, not heuristic guessing. Complements the existing Enrichment Strategy and Data Completeness Philosophy docs.

docs.title: Enrichment Freshness Strategy v1
docs.summary: Tactical companion to the Entity Maintenance Policy. Classifies every enrichment data point by stability class, sets conservative initial refresh cadences, and defines an observation framework that measures actual decay rates so cadences can be tightened or loosened with evidence over time. Built on top of the existing attribute_registry, observed_claims supersession chain, and source_registry infrastructure.

docs.title: Entity Classification Framework v1 — Dimension-Based Model
docs.summary: Defines the four-dimension classification model for entities: operating location, schedule type, identity anchor, and containment. Types are derived from stored dimensions, not hardcoded enums. Includes entity relationship rules and derived pattern table. Doc 2 of 3 in the Entity Type Taxonomy series.

docs.title: Entity Classification Layers
docs.summary: Plain-language explanation of entity classification layers in the current schema — entityType vs primary_vertical vs category vs cuisine_type — including operational authority and usage guidance.

docs.title: Entity Dimension Model — Implementation Plan v1
docs.summary: Phased implementation plan for the four-dimension entity classification model. Covers schema migration, data backfill, enrichment routing, admin tooling, and page rendering changes. Three phases: Schema + Audit, Enrichment Routing, and Consumer Surface Updates.

docs.title: Entity Maintenance Policy v1
docs.summary: Defines how Saiko maintains entity data across the full lifecycle — from soft-open through permanent closure. Establishes maintenance postures by operating status, re-enrichment cadences by source and status, and rules for when entities enter and exit active maintenance. Unifies the source-aware staleness tiers (enrichment-evidence-model-v1), link health cadences (coverage-source-enrichment-v1), and closure recheck rules (entity-state-model-v1) into a single policy.

docs.title: Entity Page Content System — Problem Framing v0
Entity Type Taxonomy — Problem Definition
docs.summary: Problem definition for the entity type model. Documents why the current single-type (venue) assumption is breaking across mobile entities, park facilities, and dormant schema fields. Doc 1 of 3 in the Entity Type Taxonomy series.

docs.title: Entity Type Taxonomy — Early Problem Statement
docs.summary: Early-stage problem statement for the entity type taxonomy. Identifies the four differentiating dimensions, candidate entity types, and open questions requiring team feedback before schema work. Precursor to the full Problem Definition (Doc 1) and Classification Framework (Doc 2).

docs.title: Events Program — Architecture-Aligned Spec (V1)
docs.summary: Defines how Saiko detects, structures, and exposes event capabilities (private dining, group dining, catering) for places. Extends the existing offering_programs model with three new program types, adds events surface discovery, and wires through to the place page contract. V1 is detect → structure → expose only — no marketplace, booking, or pricing.

docs.title: Identity Scoring — Weighted Anchor Model
docs.summary: Weighted anchor scoring model for entity identity confidence. GPID is not required — entities reach publication threshold through any combination of anchors that demonstrates sufficient identity certainty.

docs.title: Instagram Ingestion — Operational Status (V1)
docs.summary: Operational status of the Instagram batch ingestion pipeline. Documents what is being ingested (accounts + media via Business Discovery API), known limitations (CDN URL expiration, account type requirements), and downstream wiring priorities (caption signal extraction, photo pipeline, profile signals). 914 entities with Instagram handles as of 2026-03-18.

docs.title: Person Actors — Chef & Sommelier Mapping (V1)
docs.summary: Maps chefs, sommeliers, and beverage professionals to venues as first-class person actors in the Saiko graph. Uses the existing Actor model with kind=person and five new ActorRole values. V1 is manual entry and linking only — no automated extraction. V1.5 adds candidate generation from website enrichment and coverage source extraction.

docs.title: Reservation Validation V1 — Architecture Review
docs.summary: Architecture review of the reservation validation V1 proposal. Documents what exists today (merchant-evidence-only extraction, no provider API integration), recommends a separate reservation_provider_matches table with a three-tier confidence model (weak / strong_merchant / provider_verified), and defines provider-specific render behavior as an additive upgrade over the existing generic Reserve button. Includes backlog bucket analysis of 751 open missing_reservations issues.

docs.title: Social Fields — Entity-Level Specification
docs.summary: Specification for social media handle fields on entities (Instagram, TikTok). Covers storage format, discovery, validation, identity weight, and the sentinel value convention for confirmed-none.

docs.title: Instagram API Integration — Current State
docs.summary: Instagram Graph API integration state — Meta app config, permissions, verified endpoints, architectural models for media ingestion

docs.title: Instagram Integration — Implementation & Impact Doc
docs.summary: Instagram integration implementation plan and system impact — tables, sync rules, temporal signals, interpretation layer, photo strategy, attachment model. V0.2 adds current state assessment, implementation phases, and data review results.

docs.title: Instagram Ingestion — Field Spec v1
docs.summary: Instagram ingestion schema — 3 tables, field definitions, sync rules. Engineering handoff for migration + Prisma models.

docs.title: Coverage Source Enrichment Pipeline v1
docs.summary: Defines the schema, pipeline, and data flow for treating editorial coverage sources as fully enriched, durable references. Coverage sources are not just links — they are rich data artifacts that feed the interpretation layer, serve as citable references in the UI, and remain durable even if the original URL breaks.

docs.title: Coverage Operations — Architectural Position
docs.summary: Architectural position for Coverage Operations — introduces entity_issues as a unified operational layer over existing queue fragments, with tool readiness assessment and phased implementation plan.

docs.title: DEC-002 — Repo-Based Canonical Knowledge Store
docs.summary: All canonical knowledge documents live in the repository under /docs, using markdown with structured frontmatter for both human readability and machine parsing.

docs.title: Enrichment Operations Inventory
docs.summary: Canonical inventory of all enrichment operations available on an entity record — automated (Google Places, neighborhood lookup), semi-automated (GPID, Instagram, Photos), and human-only (editorial fields). Coverage Dashboard and Entity Profile are designed from this inventory outward.

docs.title: Awareness Stage — Workbench
docs.summary: Defines the Awareness stage — Saiko's pre-identity, pre-enrichment intake layer. Covers source abstraction, organization responsibilities, readiness signals, and the workbench model.

docs.title: Entity Pipeline — Overview
docs.summary: High-level model of the stages through which an entity moves inside Saiko — from first contact (Awareness) through Identification to Enrichment. Mental model only; does not prescribe UI, schema, or workflow.

docs.title: Entity Record Awareness (ERA) — One-Pager
docs.summary: Defines Entity Record Awareness (ERA) — how Saiko becomes aware a place exists, separating awareness from canonical (Golden) status to prevent silent drift.

docs.title: Saiko Vertical Taxonomy
docs.summary: Defines Saiko's 12-vertical taxonomy — the primary domains of urban life used to classify every place in the system. Documents anthropological rationale, system role, technical anchors, and design implications.

docs.title: Saiko Release Runbook v1
docs.summary: Release runbook covering the deploy flow (branch → PR → build gate → preview → merge → production), branch protection rules, incident response / rollback procedures, database migration rules, and build gate checks.

docs.title: Beverage Program + Signal Vocabulary (v1)
docs.summary: Canonical beverage program model and signal vocabulary for derived offering enrichment. Defines 5 program containers, maturity scale, and locked signal sets for wine, beer, cocktail, non-alcoholic, and coffee/tea programs.

docs.title: SAIKO FIELDS — Place Identity Concept Document
(untitled)
docs.summary: Defines capture profiles for each source type — what to attempt when a source is touched, and what can be promoted to Facts-tier vs stored as raw material.

docs.title: Instagram Integration — Workstream & Execution Plan
docs.summary: Phased execution plan for Instagram integration — 6 phases from data quality through contextual display. Includes codebase readiness assessment, effort estimates, timing recommendations, and per-phase task checklists.

docs.title: Cuisine Traditions as Structured Signals
docs.summary: Research synthesis on cuisine traditions as structured signals for the Offering Signals model

docs.title: Admin Spring Cleaning Log — March 2026
docs.summary: Record of admin routes and features retired or fixed in March 2026 — Review Queue, Energy Engine, Appearances auth, GPID Queue URL. Captures rationale for each retirement.

docs.title: Coverage Dashboard — Design Principles
docs.summary: Design principles for the Coverage Dashboard — a work surface for resolving data gaps, organized by solution type (automated vs. semi-automated vs. human-only) rather than by missing field.

docs.title: Data Pipeline — Quick Start
docs.summary: Quick-start guide for entity intake and enrichment. Start here if you have a list of place names to add.

docs.title: Data Sync Runbook
docs.summary: Copy-paste commands for verifying and syncing data across environments.

docs.title: Database Setup
docs.summary: Database setup: Neon (production), local Postgres (dev), Prisma ORM.

docs.title: Deferred Migration Gates
docs.summary: Gate conditions that must be satisfied before applying the two deferred Fields v2 migrations — slim entities and legacy table drop.

docs.title: Entities Contract Reconciliation
docs.summary: Field-level audit and decision log for the entities table — what belongs, what migrates, and what is retired as part of the Fields v2 architecture.

docs.title: Entity Profile Page — Spec
docs.summary: Spec for /admin/entity/[id] — the canonical single-entity admin view showing all field states with inline resolution actions and a TimeFOLD editorial slot.

docs.title: Environment Variables
docs.summary: Environment variable reference. Three files: .env (defaults), .env.local (secrets), .env.example (template).

docs.title: Place Identity - Implementation Verification
docs.summary: Repository and Neon DB verification snapshot for place identity implementation state as of 2026-03.

docs.title: Saiko Fields v2 — Target Architecture Spec
docs.summary: Defines the four-layer Fields v2 architecture — entities routing shell, canonical_entity_state, interpretation_cache, and place_coverage_status — with anti-drift rules and current migration status.

docs.title: Google Places API — Unblock Legacy Text Search
Local Development
docs.summary: Local development setup: install, configure, run.

docs.title: Pipeline Commands
docs.summary: Operator command reference for entity enrichment, identity resolution, social discovery, and coverage operations.

docs.title: Resolver pipeline and golden_records → places data flow
Atomic Cultural Signals
docs.summary: Defines the atomic cultural signal model used to structure place data in Saiko Fields.

docs.title: Data Layer Contract
docs.summary: Defines architectural boundaries and data access rules between the Saiko Data Layer, Fields platform, and TRACES consumer product.

docs.title: Derived Signals Engine
docs.summary: Defines how derived signals are computed, governed, versioned, and exposed within the Saiko Fields system.

docs.title: Enrichment Model V1 — Vertical-Aware Completeness
docs.summary: Defines three-bucket enrichment model (Identity / Access / Offering) with vertical-aware completeness profiles. Replaces flat field checklist with context-relative scoring.

docs.title: Saiko Architecture Glossary
docs.summary: Canonical glossary of core Fields and TRACES architecture terms for shared system language.

docs.title: Identity Resolver Specification
docs.summary: Resolver inputs, anchors, active matching logic, and future threshold model for entity identity resolution.

docs.title: Signals Registry
docs.summary: Defines how atomic and derived cultural signals are formally structured and governed within the Saiko Fields system.

docs.title: Fields System Map - Signals to Interpretation
docs.summary: Top-level architecture map for Fields-to-TRACES flow from observations to cultural interpretation.

docs.title: LA Places → Program Mapping (v1)
docs.summary: Real-world validation of sushi/ramen/dumpling programs across 20 LA restaurants.

docs.title: Ramen Program — LA Validation Mapping
docs.summary: Real-world stress test of ramen program across specialty shops, multi-style bars, and legacy anchors in Los Angeles.

docs.title: Taco Program — LA Validation Mapping
docs.summary: Real-world stress test of taco program across street tacos, taquerias, and contemporary concepts in Los Angeles.

docs.title: Offering Programs — Unified System Architecture v1
docs.summary: Canonical architecture for format-based offering programs. Unifies dumpling, sushi, ramen, taco, and pizza under coherent signal + maturity system.

docs.title: Offering Program Template — How to Add a New Program
docs.summary: Step-by-step template for adding a new offering program. Covers signal definition, assembly logic, contract, API, and dashboard wiring.

docs.title: Ramen Program — Broth-Driven System Architecture v2
docs.summary: Broth-system-driven ramen program anchored in specialization and execution depth. Validated across 15 LA ramen shops spanning legacy, specialty, and modern categories.

docs.title: Taco Program — Format-Based Offering System v1
docs.summary: Canonical specification for taco program. Format-based system anchored in subtype (filling + technique), with tortilla as co-equal structural component.

docs.title: About Description Spec v1
docs.summary: Spec for the About description on the place page — 3-tier sourcing hierarchy, VOICE_DESCRIPTOR generation, and rendering rules.

docs.title: Place Page Design v1
docs.summary: Canonical design spec for the Saiko place profile page — wireframe, data sources, content model, and rendering rules.

docs.title: WO-ABOUT-001 — VOICE_DESCRIPTOR Generation Pipeline
docs.summary: Execution work order for the VOICE_DESCRIPTOR generation pipeline — 3 checkpoints covering Tier 1 extraction, Tier 2/3 generation, and API read path + rendering.

docs.title: SceneSense Display Contract v2
docs.summary: Display contract for the revised SceneSense three-lens model (Atmosphere / Energy / Scene). Supersedes SS-DISPLAY-CONTRACT-V1.

docs.title: Three Universal Lenses Framework
docs.summary: Defines the three universal lenses (Atmosphere, Energy, Scene) used by SceneSense to interpret restaurant environments.

docs.title: Atmosphere Lens
docs.summary: Defines the Atmosphere lens — physical and sensory environment of the dining space.

docs.title: Energy Lens
docs.summary: Defines the Energy lens — activity level and temporal rhythm of the place.

docs.title: Scene Lens
docs.summary: Defines the Scene lens — social patterns of use and behavioral expectations.

docs.title: SceneSense Glossary of Terms
docs.summary: Canonical glossary of SceneSense terminology for engineers, editors, and models.

docs.title: Coverage Dashboard — Design Principles
docs.summary: Design principles for the Coverage Dashboard — work surface, not report; smart counts; group by solution; automation first

docs.title: Coverage Ops Issue Contract (v1)
docs.summary: Canonical issue contract for Coverage Ops v1 — issue types, severity, gating, and UI action mappings.

docs.title: Draft Trigger v1
docs.summary: Defines when reusable knowledge must become a controlled draft.

docs.title: Promotion Flow v1
docs.summary: Defines the controlled path from approved draft to canonical document.

docs.title: Research Document Format
docs.summary: Defines the standard format for research documents ingested into the Saiko knowledge base
